title: How to tell if your dog loves you

scenes.title: Opening Hook
scenes.voText: Have you ever wondered if your dog truly loves you? Understanding your pet's feelings can strengthen your bond and enhance your relationship. Let’s explore the signs that reveal your dog's affection.
scenes.visualPrompt: close-up of a happy dog wagging its tail, indoors in a cozy living room, soft natural lighting filtering through a window

scenes.title: Early History
scenes.voText: Dogs have been companions to humans for thousands of years. Initially bred for hunting and guarding, these loyal animals evolved to understand human emotions and behaviors.
scenes.visualPrompt: historical illustrations of ancient humans with dogs in a hunting scene, warm earthy tones, slightly faded look to mimic age

scenes.title: Key Developments
scenes.voText: As dogs adapted to life with humans, they developed unique ways to express love. From gentle nudges to playful barks, these behaviors became signs of affection.
scenes.visualPrompt: various clips of dogs interacting lovingly with their owners in a park, bright daylight, joyful atmosphere

scenes.title: Modern Era
scenes.voText: Today, science backs up what pet owners have always felt. Studies show that dogs release oxytocin, the love hormone, when they interact with their humans.
scenes.visualPrompt: scientist observing dogs in a lab setting, modern equipment, focused expressions, bright lighting

scenes.title: Future Outlook
scenes.voText: As we continue to understand canine behavior, our relationships with dogs will deepen. The future holds exciting possibilities for bonding and communication.
scenes.visualPrompt: futuristic illustration of a human and dog interacting with technology, bright colors, optimistic vibe

scenes.title: Call to Action
scenes.voText: Now that you know the signs of a dog's love, pay attention to your furry friend. Share your experiences in the comments below and let us know how your dog shows affection!
scenes.visualPrompt: a dog looking up at the camera with a loving gaze, soft focus background, warm lighting
